final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU" with an autumnal, poetic, and serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with natural poetry and warm healing quality — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth of field — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" wordmark integrated with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact natural elements and setting are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a 金色时光 (golden hour) warm and tranquil atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a warm, natural surface treatment — exact texture and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
